title: Life Sap heals your creature on opponent draw

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Equip this card to your opponent's creature. Whenever your opponent draws a card, inflict 5 damage to the equipped creature and heal your creature 5 HP.

plan.title: Life Sap heals your creature on opponent draw
plan.summary: Equip Life Sap to the opponent creature, trigger the opponent draw, and verify your creature heals 5 HP.

notes: Set player_1 primary current hp to 40 before Life Sap resolves.
Pre-place Life Sap as field magic equipped to player_2 primary creature.
When player_2 draws a card, Life Sap heals your creature 5 HP.

steps: Set player_1 primary creature current HP to 40.
Equip Life Sap to player_2 primary creature.

expectedAssertions.label: Your creature heals 5 on opponent draw

manualVerification: The heal should target the Life Sap controller creature while the damage targets the equipped opponent creature.
riskNotes: This fixture is the heal branch; 018-E01 covers damage to the equipped creature.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_018_life_sap-018-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
